steps.title: Use the art context
steps.content: Gogol is making art and marking his work: he carves his name into clay, pastes pasta to cardboard, and leaves his signature below paintings in brush strokes. In this setting, leaving a signature means putting a written mark on the artwork.

steps.title: Reject nonmarking meanings
steps.content: B means changes or swaps something, C means permits something, and D means advertises or advances something. None describes making a visible signature with paint. The meaning that fits is writing the signature. The answer is A.
